nasb.text: Now therefore, behold, the Lord has put a deceiving spirit in the mouth of all these your prophets; and the Lord has proclaimed disaster against you.”

esv.text: Now therefore behold, the Lord has put a lying spirit in the mouth of all these your prophets; the Lord has declared disaster for you.”

cnv.text: 現在，耶和華已經把說謊的靈放在你這些先知的口中，耶和華已經命定災禍臨到你。”

ccb.text: 现在，耶和华已经把谎言之灵放进这些先知口中，耶和华已决意降祸给你。”
